canonical_definition: A benchmark of 10,000 medical question-answer pairs with systematically generated hallucinated answers, stratified by difficulty (easy, medium, hard) and hallucination type, used to evaluate medical hallucination detection in LLMs.
papers: Ask Patients with Patience: EnablingLLMs for Human-Centric Medical Dialogue with Grounded Reasoning

definitions.text: A benchmark of 10,000 medical question-answer pairs with systematically generated hallucinated answers, stratified by difficulty (easy, medium, hard) and hallucination type, used to evaluate medical hallucination detection in LLMs.
definitions.paper: Ask Patients with Patience: EnablingLLMs for Human-Centric Medical Dialogue with Grounded Reasoning

relationships.paper: Ask Patients with Patience: EnablingLLMs for Human-Centric Medical Dialogue with Grounded Reasoning
relationships.evidence: To address this, we introduce MedHallu, one of the first benchmark specifically designed for medical hallucination detection.

emnlp25: Ask Patients with Patience: EnablingLLMs for Human-Centric Medical Dialogue with Grounded Reasoning

relationships.paper: Ask Patients with Patience: EnablingLLMs for Human-Centric Medical Dialogue with Grounded Reasoning
relationships.evidence: MedHallu comprises 10,000 high-quality question-answer pairs derived from the established PubMedQA dataset.
